title: test_space_set_description_null_is_valid is a vacuous oracle
description: Trigger: The test creates a space with no description (already null), then patches {"description": null}. Bad behavior: it only asserts result[updated] contains the space_id — it does not do a follow-up Space/get to verify description==null in the DB. Because description was already null, the test passes regardless of whether the clearing logic works. It is precisely the regression test for nie-ux95.1 but it fails to catch the bug it was written to prevent. Fix: create a space with a description first (e.g. Space/create with description='HasDesc'), then patch to null, then Space/get and assert response list[0].description is null/absent.
